title: Wano Splits Between Udon and the Flower Capital
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Toko, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Komurasaki, Robin, Wano Citizens as The Wano rebellion spreads between Udon prison, the Flower Capital, and the first shocks around Komurasaki and Orochi.
scene: The rebellion’s pieces scatter across Wano while Luffy struggles in Udon and Orochi’s court grows unstable in the Flower Capital.

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: Hahaha!! Your laugh is contagious!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hey, what's your name?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's TOKC.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Go ahead and try adding "O" in front of it!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: O-TOKO- CHAN.

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: I'm not a boy, though!! ahahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: BOHAH-!!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: But I am O-TOKO*!!!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: Im Funny, Right? Ahaha haha!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's easy to remember, so I tell people that all the time!! Fufufu!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, it was delicious!! Thank you for the meal!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Come again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Yeah!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, no, I'm really going to be late!! Super late!! Ahahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah! That's right! I'll be passing through this area again later today, since today is the courtesy processing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: TOHO- chan, are you, perhaps... a kamuro?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's right!! I'm a kamuro!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's about to start!! I gotta go!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Bye bye...!! see you again some- time!!

dialogue.speaker: Komurasaki
dialogue.text: The Courtesan is Beau- Tiful...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So make sure to come and watch!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Kukuki...!! Aaah, she was really funny!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: TOKC-CHAN is such a bright child. How cute! ♥

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So the rumoured courte- San procession will be passing through here....!!

dialogue.speaker: Komurasaki
dialogue.text: Courtesan? Kamuro?

dialogue.speaker: Komurasaki
dialogue.text: A COURTESAN!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WhoAaaa!! Where'd this paper lantern Granny come from...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who are 'You calling a whinkled paper lantern Granny!!? Shall I Dazzle 'You to Death!? 'You SHITTY BRATS!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: O-Robi, I've got good news for you!!

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: It's already spread around the Capital!!!

dialogue.speaker: Komurasaki
dialogue.text: COURTESANS ARE...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Top idols here in the Wano Country!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: They're Super- Stars!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I see!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She is the only one who has been chosen so far!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: her name is Komurask!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's the dream of all men!! her womanly charisma...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Along with her beauty, can sway men from even the most sophisticated of countries!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: GUL.P!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She is more dignified than a goddess!! She is the perfect/ow that women strive to be!!

dialogue.speaker: Komurasaki
dialogue.text: SHE IS THE COURTESAN, KOMURA- SAK!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: .....!!...!...Possible!! There's just no way that such a woman exists!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then why don't you go and see it for yourselves!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...Listen, you can hear them already!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The cheers surrounding her and the light click- ing of her sandals.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: SPX: Music

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Today is the Shogun's banquet!!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: It's at Orochi's Castle!!

dialogue.speaker: Komurasaki
dialogue.text: The Courtesan is on her way there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that little girl from earlier was a kamuro. They are young girls that serve courteans.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, that's right, I almost forgot! O-Robi, Congratula- Tions!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've also been summoned to Orochi's sitting room!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You wanted to meet Shogun Orochi, didn't you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yes, I did.

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Amazing!! As expected of O-ROBI- CHAAAAN!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Come with me immediately!! We must prepare!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes...! I'm really looking forward to it.:)

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon and Flower Capital storyline with 59 dialogue beats. Luffy’s prison struggle, Big Mom’s amnesia, and the Flower Capital drama show Wano’s rebellion becoming harder to control.
